note_text: Just noting for the record that my favorite color is teal.

expect.rationale: A genuinely novel concept (no near canonical) is a cold band -> the unknown predicate commits on its raw name and files exactly one new_predicate review card. The exact predicate Grok emits is latitude, so the card is asserted by kind.

note_text: Random fact about me: I can wiggle my ears on command.

expect.rationale: Another novel-concept cold case -> a new_predicate card. Drift->STRONG-rewrite and near-miss->WEAK cases are authored during the Phase-4 calibration run, where the real Grok predicate + embedding sims are observed.
